'''Scouts''' were aquatic [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] for [[Navy/Legends|naval]] operations and made up the bulk of its aquatic navy. They could be upgraded to support additional armaments and armor.<ref name="GB" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''
